features.description: Add approved Argon2id, hidden prompt, SHA-2, and JSON dependencies to Cargo.toml and refresh Cargo.lock
features.validation: cargo check; verifies dependency resolution and compilation

features.description: Add sha256-prefixed key id helpers and .git/git-zcrypt/index.json read/write/update support in src/key_store.rs
features.validation: cargo test key_store; covers key id formatting, sorted JSON index writes, and duplicate key rejection

features.description: Update generate-key and import-key to register raw keys in index.json and reject duplicate key material
features.validation: cargo test key_store; verifies generated/imported keys update index and duplicates fail

features.description: Add derive-key setup command with hidden confirmation prompt and --stdin password input
features.validation: cargo test derive_key; covers stdin derivation, confirmation mismatch handling, and zeroized temporary buffers where observable

features.description: Update clean to write hash-prefixed blob key ids and smudge to resolve blob key ids through index.json
features.validation: cargo test --test filter_roundtrip; verifies raw and password-derived keys round-trip through clean/smudge

features.description: Update status output to list aliases with hash-prefixed key ids and warn on key/index mismatches
features.validation: cargo test git_config; verifies status formatting and warning behavior where locally testable

features.description: Update README.md and progress.toml for approved password-derived key behavior
features.validation: cargo test && rg -q 'derive-key|sha256:' README.md && rg -q 'passes = true' progress.toml
